room_features.name: Collapsed Chamber
room_features.desc: A chamber has partly caved in. Rubble chokes one wall and a cold draft seeps through the stones.
room_features.hint: There may be a crawlspace hidden in the rubble.

room_features.name: Flooded Room
room_features.desc: Black water stands knee-deep here, hiding the floor and muffling every footfall.

room_features.name: Fungus Garden
room_features.desc: Pale shelves of fungus climb the walls, some glowing faintly in the dark.
room_features.hint: Useful alchemical growth can be gathered here.

room_features.name: Bat Roost
room_features.desc: The ceiling writhes with disturbed bats hanging above a floor of old guano.
room_features.hint: A sudden noise here will be carried far.

room_features.name: Underground Stream
room_features.desc: A narrow stream cuts through the room, leaving slick stones and a constant murmur.

room_features.name: Ancient Barracks
room_features.desc: Rotting bunks and broken weapon racks suggest soldiers once slept here.
room_features.hint: There may still be intact kit under the straw.

room_features.name: Sealed Treasury
room_features.desc: Iron-bound chests sit behind a secondary grille door crusted with age.
room_features.hint: This place was meant to protect real wealth.

room_features.name: Forgotten Armory
room_features.desc: Weapon racks line the walls, most empty, some still holding rusted iron.
room_features.hint: One or two pieces may still be fit for use.

room_features.name: Burial Chamber
room_features.desc: Stone biers and cracked funerary urns fill this burial chamber.
room_features.hint: Disturbing the dead here feels dangerous.

room_features.name: Noble Tomb
room_features.desc: An ornate sarcophagus dominates the room, attended by faded murals of conquest.
room_features.hint: Rich grave goods may remain, if you dare.

room_features.name: Monster Nest
room_features.desc: The room is piled with bones, torn bedding, and the signs of some creature's den.

room_features.name: Guard Post
room_features.desc: A rough guard post watches the approach, complete with signal gong and murder holes.
room_features.hint: Whatever held this post expected trouble from the halls beyond.

room_features.name: Prison Cells
room_features.desc: Rusting bars divide a line of cramped cells, one of them hanging open.

room_features.name: Hermit Chamber
room_features.desc: Someone has lived here recently: a bedroll, a cookpot, and chalk sigils cover the walls.
room_features.hint: A wary hermit may know more than they first admit.

room_features.name: Hidden Library
room_features.desc: Dusty shelves survive behind a concealed panel, holding damp but legible books.

room_features.name: Map Room
room_features.desc: A cracked stone table bears an etched survey of tunnels and chambers.
room_features.hint: Useful routes can be learned here.

room_features.name: Secret Workshop
room_features.desc: A hidden workshop holds bent tools, crucibles, and the smell of long-dried oil.
room_features.hint: There may be something valuable under the benches.

room_features.name: Hidden Vault
room_features.desc: A concealed vault waits behind a stone seam, its fittings better made than the rest of the dungeon.

room_features.name: Arcane Circle
room_features.desc: A faded circle of sigils glows faintly when approached, as if the room remembers old rites.
room_features.hint: Arcane residue still clings to the floor.

room_features.name: Crystal Cavern
room_features.desc: Needles of crystal catch every glimmer of light and throw it back in ghostly colors.

room_features.name: Time-Worn Shrine
room_features.desc: An eroded idol sits in a niche, watched by hundreds of spent votive stubs.
room_features.hint: This old shrine may still answer prayer.

room_features.name: Whispering Hall
room_features.desc: The corridor beyond carries whispers that sound almost like your own voices.

room_features.name: Gas Chamber
room_features.desc: A sour smell hangs in the still air, and your torchlight gutters dangerously.

room_features.name: Razorvine Growth
room_features.desc: Thick black vines armed with hooked thorns crawl across the walls and floor.

traps.name: Arrow Slit Trap
traps.desc: Hidden slits crack open in the wall and a volley of arrows lashes the corridor.

traps.name: Falling Block
traps.desc: A stone block drops from above with a murderous crash.

traps.name: Pit Trap
traps.desc: The floor drops away into a concealed pit.

traps.name: Spiked Pit
traps.desc: The floor collapses into a pit lined with rusted spikes.

traps.name: Deep Pit
traps.desc: A stone lip gives way underfoot and someone plunges into darkness below.

traps.name: Crushing Walls
traps.desc: Stone panels grind inward, threatening to pulp anything in their path.

traps.name: Swinging Blade
traps.desc: A blade scythes out from a hidden recess at waist height.

traps.name: Rune Explosion
traps.desc: A warding rune flares and bursts in a wash of force.

traps.name: Teleport Trap
traps.desc: Space twists, dumping the victim bruised and disoriented a short distance away.

traps.name: Fear Rune
traps.desc: A sigil flashes in the mind, filling the victim with primal dread.

traps.name: Poison Needle Chest
traps.desc: A fine needle darts from the lock as the mechanism is touched.

traps.name: Gas Vent
traps.desc: A hidden vent belches noxious fumes into the room.

traps.name: Acid Spray
traps.desc: A clay ampoule shatters overhead, showering the victim in hissing acid.

traps.name: Alarm Trap
traps.desc: A concealed bell-hammer snaps free and rings through the dungeon.

events.name: Sudden Cave-In
events.desc: Fresh stone cracks and a shower of grit spills from above.

events.name: Strange Wind
events.desc: A chill wind snakes through the room, making torches dance and shadows lurch.

events.name: Echoing Noise
events.desc: A distant clang echoes through the halls, then answers itself from farther in.

events.name: Wandering Patrol Signs
events.desc: Boot prints and scraps of fresh torch soot suggest a patrol passed recently.

events.name: Monster Feeding Time
events.desc: Half-chewed carrion and fresh spoor suggest the room's denizens were only just here.

events.name: Monster Migration
events.desc: Something large has recently moved through, dragging nests and debris with it.
events.clue_text: Something has stirred the usual patterns; creatures are on the move.

events.name: Ghostly Apparition
events.desc: A pale apparition drifts across the room and fades before it reaches the far wall.
events.clue_text: The apparition repeats the same path, hinting at a place of importance nearby.

events.name: Temporal Flicker
events.desc: For a heartbeat the room seems new again, then old dust settles back into place.

events.name: Magic Surge
events.desc: Dormant enchantments crackle awake for an instant, leaving the air tingling.

events.name: Hidden Compartment
events.desc: A loosened stone reveals a narrow compartment tucked into the wall.
events.clue_text: Someone concealed goods here for a reason; valuables or danger may lie close by.

events.name: Ancient Cache
events.desc: A sealed crock survives in a corner niche, filled with old but still spendable coins.

events.name: Lost Adventurer Pack
events.desc: A moldy backpack lies forgotten in the dust, its straps long since rotted through.
events.clue_text: The pack owner likely died nearby; their route may still be followed.

events.name: Unstable Floor
events.desc: Flagstones shift ominously underfoot, as though a void waits below them.

events.name: Strange Idol
events.desc: A squat idol watches from a plinth, warm to the touch despite the cold room.
events.clue_text: The idol depicts a power still honored somewhere in these halls.

events.name: Whispering Statue
events.desc: A cracked statue murmurs one phrase over and over in a voice like dry leaves.
events.clue_text: The statue points to a deeper secret if you heed its muttering.

events.name: Adventurer Skeleton
events.desc: An old adventurer's bones lie where they fell, one hand still clutching a journal scrap.
events.clue_text: The remains suggest previous delvers reached this far and failed beyond this point.

events.name: Faded Mural
events.desc: A mural, almost lost to mildew, depicts sacrifices and hidden doors.
events.clue_text: The mural preserves a fragment of the dungeon’s purpose and warns what lies below.

events.name: Blood Trail
events.desc: A dark, half-dried blood trail leads deeper into the level.
events.clue_text: Whatever made this trail was wounded, but it went deeper rather than out.

shrines.name: Shrine of Light
shrines.desc: A white-stone shrine gleams softly despite the grime around it.

shrines.name: Shrine of War
shrines.desc: An iron idol of conquest looms over an altar scarred by weapon blows.

shrines.name: Shrine of Fate
shrines.desc: Threads and carved bones lie at this weathered altar of uncertain fortune.
shrines.clue_text: Offerings suggest others came here before taking dangerous chances deeper in.

shrines.name: Shrine of Shadows
shrines.desc: A soot-darkened niche swallows light and sound around it.

shrines.name: Forgotten God Shrine
shrines.desc: No script remains legible on this ancient altar, only the feeling of age.
shrines.clue_text: This cult’s traces appear abandoned, but not entirely dead.

shrines.name: Blood Altar
shrines.desc: A block of black stone bears old stains and a channel for sacrifice.

shrines.name: Knowledge Shrine
shrines.desc: Ink-black bowls and a carved eye adorn this shrine to hidden lore.
shrines.clue_text: Symbols here hint that hidden paths and buried lore reward careful study.

shrines.name: Trickster Shrine
shrines.desc: The idol here smiles with chipped teeth and mismatched gem eyes.

puzzles.name: Rotating Pillars
puzzles.desc: Stone pillars covered in symbols can be rotated with great effort.
puzzles.clue_text: The mechanism likely guards more than a simple door.

puzzles.name: Weight Plate Puzzle
puzzles.desc: A series of plates and counterweights bars the way to a narrow alcove.

puzzles.name: Mirror Beam Puzzle
puzzles.desc: Bronze mirrors surround a socket waiting for a beam of light to be aligned.
puzzles.clue_text: The mirrors were arranged to reveal or unlock something hidden.

puzzles.name: Water Level Puzzle
puzzles.desc: Old sluice gates and stone channels suggest the room once flooded on command.

puzzles.name: Lever Maze
puzzles.desc: A bank of levers controls hidden catches somewhere in the walls.
puzzles.clue_text: Repeated wear suggests explorers used this puzzle as a route marker.

puzzles.name: Statue Alignment
puzzles.desc: Heavy statues can be turned to face different alcoves and markings.
